note: Working dataset for the app. General actions/reactions available to all characters, plus worked-example heroic key talents. 'eff' is terse shorthand in our own words. Costs marked '?' were rendered as glyphs in extraction and use the standard 1-action default; verify against your book.

abilities.name: Strike
abilities.eff: unarmed/weapon atk vs Physical. Repeatable, but each uses a different hand; offhand costs 2F.

abilities.name: Move
abilities.eff: move up to movement rate; Slowed conditions reduce it. Repeatable.

abilities.name: Interact
abilities.eff: manipulate a nearby object (draw weapon, open door, grab item); no test. Repeatable.

abilities.name: Use a Skill
abilities.eff: roll a skill to handle a battlefield task (hide, search, treat).

abilities.name: Gain Advantage
abilities.eff: skill test vs foe defense; success -> advantage on next test vs that foe with a different skill.

abilities.name: Brace
abilities.eff: take cover within 5ft; attacks vs you get disadvantage until you move/attack.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.eff: move 5ft without triggering Reactive Strikes.

abilities.name: Grapple
abilities.eff: Athletics vs Physical; success -> target Restrained while in reach.

abilities.name: Shove
abilities.eff: Athletics vs Physical; success -> push/pull 5ft; ends a Grapple on you.

abilities.name: Recover
abilities.eff: roll recovery die to regain health/focus (as a short rest). Once per scene; can spend extra actions.

abilities.name: Ready
abilities.eff: pick a trigger + an action; use that action when the trigger fires before your next turn. Costs the action's cost +1a.

abilities.name: Banter
abilities.eff: speak briefly; nuanced/persuasive speech needs Use a Skill instead.

abilities.name: Drop
abilities.eff: drop held objects.

abilities.name: Aid
abilities.eff: trigger: ally about to test -> grant them an advantage.

abilities.name: Dodge
abilities.eff: trigger: an attack is aimed at you -> impose disadvantage on it. Not vs area/multi-target.

abilities.name: Avoid Danger
abilities.eff: trigger: imperiled by surroundings -> Agility test (DC = triggering result, else 15) to escape/mitigate.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.eff: trigger: foe willingly steps out of your reach -> melee/unarmed atk vs Physical. Not vs instantaneous movement.

abilities.name: Opportunist
abilities.eff: 1x each round: re-roll one plot-die result.

abilities.name: Rousing Presence
abilities.eff: make an ally Determined.

abilities.name: Seek Quarry
abilities.eff: mark a target to pursue; gain an advantage against it.

abilities.name: Decisive Command
abilities.eff: give an ally a bonus d4 ('command die') applied to one roll.

abilities.name: Erudition
abilities.eff: gain bonus skill ranks you can reallocate.

abilities.name: Vigilant Stance
abilities.eff: adopt a defensive stance granting added responsiveness and flexibility.
